## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss Engine's content strategy, performance, and potential new initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Performance is trending up but could be stronger; focus on strategic content lanes may help](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [FAQ schema implementation in Webflow needs refinement for long-term maintainability](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [PSEO opportunities exist with 4,000-7,000 unindexed pages; worth exploring for quick wins](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Roomblocks SOW needs further discussion to align on scope, deliverables, and pricing](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=1697.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Analysis

  - [Overall performance: 3% up week-over-week, relatively flat](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=804.0)
  - [Impression spike last week, clicks trending up but could be stronger](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - [New content showing promise, refresh content mostly flat except for one standout article](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Opportunity to focus on 2 high-conviction content lanes while leaving room for experimentation](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=1106.0)

### FAQ Schema Implementation

  - [Current Webflow setup references outdated HotelEngine.com](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [Considering building a component that generates schema from HTML markup with data attributes](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [This approach would ensure FAQs stay in sync during future content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)

### PSEO Opportunities

  - [4,000-7,000 unindexed pages present potential quick wins](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)
  - [Need to explore indexation strategy without overwhelming search engines](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [Could be an area to experiment with alongside topical content focus](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)

### Roomblocks SOW Discussion

  - [Concerns raised about pricing and clarity of deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [Kyle explained the value of the strategy sprint in creating repeatable processes](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=2009.0)
  - [Team to schedule a follow-up meeting to discuss options and find a mutually beneficial approach](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)

### AI Content Hallucination Concerns

  - [Joel identified instances of AI-generated content misrepresenting Engine's features](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Team to implement more rigorous fact-checking and specific product language to mitigate issues](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to follow up with team on FAQ schema implementation options](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [Joel to add examples of AI content hallucinations to the Notion doc](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Cole to schedule a 15-minute sync with Joel, James, and Colin to discuss Roomblocks SOW](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=2235.0)
  - [Kyle to arrange a meeting with Marcel (if available) to discuss SOW flexibility and pricing](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=2286.0)
  - [Team to explore PSEO opportunities and develop an indexation strategy](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)
  - [Kyle to work on addressing data gaps and improving performance metrics visibility](https://fathom.video/share/uTtEf4WpHXSBoAeHT8dzyMEWHeVzib6f?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
